nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Input audio signal, processed in 32-sample fixed blocks

nodes.label: fb_out (receive)
nodes.description: Receives feedback from fb_in. Mixes: input + Feedback * delayed_signal

nodes.label: delay (fix_delay)
nodes.description: Delays signal by DelayTime ms. FadeTime controls crossfade on time changes.

nodes.label: fb_in (send)
nodes.description: Sends delayed output back to fb_out, completing the feedback loop

nodes.label: Feedback
nodes.description: Feedback gain (0..1, internal to fb_out). Controls echo decay rate.

nodes.label: DelayTime
nodes.description: Delay time in ms (0..1000, internal to delay node)

nodes.label: FadeTime
nodes.description: Crossfade time in samples (0..1024, internal to delay node)
